ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "original_title" TEXT /* Original title of the movie */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the movie */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the movie in minutes */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget of the movie */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated by the movie */,
  "popularity" REAL /* Popularity score of the movie */,
  "vote_average" REAL /* Average vote rating of the movie */,
  "vote_count" INTEGER /* Number of votes the movie has received */,
  "overview" TEXT /* Overview or plot summary of the movie */,
  "original_language" TEXT /* Original language of the movie */,
  "director" TEXT /* Director of the movie */,
  "production_status" TEXT /* Production status of the movie */,
  "tagline" TEXT /* Tagline of the movie */,
  "homepage" TEXT /* Homepage of the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_genres" (
  "movie_genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie-genre relationship */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_genres_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_genres_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the production company */,
  "company_description" TEXT /* Description of the production company */,
  "founding_year" TEXT /* Year the production company was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_production_companies" (
  "movie_company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie-production company relationship */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_production_companies_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES production_companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_production_companies_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the production country */,
  "iso_3166_1" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 code of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_production_countries" (
  "movie_country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie-production country relationship */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_production_countries_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_production_countries_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES production_countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_languages" (
  "movie_language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie-language relationship */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* ID of the language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_language_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_languages_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_languages_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES languages ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cast_members" (
  "cast_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cast member */,
  "cast_member_name" TEXT /* Name of the cast member */,
  "profile_path" TEXT /* Profile path of the cast member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cast_member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_cast_members" (
  "movie_cast_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie-cast member relationship */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "cast_member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cast member */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character played by the cast member */,
  "order" INTEGER /* Order of the cast member in the movie credits */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_cast_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_cast_members_cast_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("cast_member_id") REFERENCES cast_members ("cast_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_cast_members_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crew_members" (
  "crew_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crew member */,
  "crew_member_name" TEXT /* Name of the crew member */,
  "profile_path" TEXT /* Profile path of the crew member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crew_member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_crew_members" (
  "movie_crew_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie-crew member relationship */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "crew_member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crew member */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the crew member */,
  "job" TEXT /* Job title of the crew member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_crew_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_crew_members_crew_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("crew_member_id") REFERENCES crew_members ("crew_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_crew_members_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being reviewed */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the user's review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financials" (
  "financial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial record */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget of the movie */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated by the movie */,
  "profit" REAL /* Profit made from the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financials_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)
